description_long: This bungalow features a rectangular structure with a flat roof and a prominent staircase leading up to an elevated entrance. The exterior walls appear to be constructed from concrete or a similar solid material, while the roof has a smooth, light-colored finish with rounded corners. The staircase is made of wood and includes a simple railing, providing access from the ground level to the main living area. The building sits on a light wooden platform that mimics a tiled or parquet floor, suggesting an urban or suburban setting. There are no visible windows or doors on the main facades, giving the structure a minimalist and modern appearance. The overall design is functional, with clean lines and a focus on accessibility.
description: A modern, minimalist bungalow with a flat roof, concrete walls, and a wooden staircase leading to an elevated entrance, set on a light wooden platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden staircase with railing leading up to the main entrance and the flat roof above.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the rectangular roof opening and the alignment of the staircase beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid concrete wall and the side profile of the staircase railing.
description_view_3: Side view revealing the open stair treads and the central supporting wall beneath the bungalow.
